name: Nest Drizzle
description: Adds Drizzle ORM (PostgreSQL) to a NestJS project and provides a custom resource generator that replaces `nest g res` — no tests, real DB queries.
author: oxide-cli

commands.name: install
commands.description: Sets up Drizzle ORM with PostgreSQL in the NestJS + Fastify project

steps.content: DATABASE_URL=postgres://user:password@localhost:5432/dbname
import { DrizzleModule } from './db/drizzle.module';
DrizzleModule,

commands.name: generate
commands.description: Generates a NestJS resource (module, controller, service, DTOs, schema) backed by Drizzle — no tests, real DB queries

inputs.name: resource_name
inputs.description: Resource name in kebab-case (e.g. user, blog-post)

steps.content: export class Create{{ resource_name_pascal }}Dto {}
import { {{ resource_name_pascal }}Module } from './{{ resource_name_kebab }}/{{ resource_name_kebab }}.module';
{{ resource_name_pascal }}Module,

{{ resource_name_pascal }}Module,
